title: Barabbici I
description: A modpack that aims for a Vanilla+ experience, tweaked for multiplayer, perfectly compatible for those who are not used to mods!
body:
##  What is this modpack?
A vanilla-oriented modpack, with several tweaks to address visual aspects of the game, making it more appealing and less boring, at least to the eyes!

In addition, the terrain generation has been modified to meet the need for a more interesting world, with the addition of several structures that render exploration both worthwile and exciting. Long gone are the days of mob farms required for the needs of most exp-related activities!

Lastly, for those who like to build, fish, race horses or soar thorugh the skies, you haven't been left behind! This modpack has attempted to add as many blocks, decorations, means of transport and QoL tweaks to enhance your exploration and creations! Now you won't need to mix stone bricks with stone bricks for added diversity!

### Difficulty
The modpack has been tweaked to achieve a difficulty akin to the vanilla game, but the higher the game difficulty, the more things scale in toughness, so be warned!

However, some structures added in the Overworld will be a real challange even at normal difficulty, especially in early game!

Also, with future updates some versions will add a higher difficuty with the addition of new mobs and AI improvements (these versions will be marked as Hard).

### The first version of the modpack is the most "bare bones", but it is still an enhanced vanilla experience. With future updates, more blocks and threaths will be added to differentiate upon the feel of the game!
